title: Farnborough Airport Signs Landmark 12.5 Million Litre Sustainable Aviation Fuel Deal in a Pioneering Step to Help Kick-Start the UK Domestic Refining Sector
content: Farnborough Airport, the Birthplace of British Aviation and Europeâ€™s leading airport for premium air travel connectivity, has announced that it has signed a landmark deal with Hydrogen Refinery for 12.5 million litres or 10,000 tonnes per annum of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) produced locally from waste. Farnborough Airport is already one of the largest single-site suppliers of SAF to the business aviation community, having sold over 2 million litres of 38% blended SAF since 2021.
author: Analysts Account
